title: Version bump to 0.6.1 with security scan and release commit
description:
Bump Forge to 0.6.1 following the CLAUDE.md versioning protocol.

Steps:
1. Update forge/.claude-plugin/plugin.json version to '0.6.1'
2. Verify forge/migrations.json has the 0.6.0→0.6.1 entry (added in T02)
3. Run security scan per CLAUDE.md:
   /security-watchdog:scan-plugin forge:forge --source-path forge/
   Save full report to docs/security/scan-v0.6.1.md
4. Add row to Security Scan History table in README.md
5. Commit all changes with message: 'chore: Release v0.6.1 [FORGE-S03-T03]'
